  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model

Uses of Package
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model

Packages that use com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar
Grammar-based representation infrastructure.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.build
Grammar builders/parsers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.encoding
Deterministic grammar decision-vector encoding utilities.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.eval
Tree evaluators for grammar-derived programs.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model
Grammar model entities.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.ops
Grammar operator registry and protected primitives.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.render
Rendering utilities for symbolic trees.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.serialize
Serialization formats for grammar trees and metadata.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar
    Class
    Description
    DerivationTree
    Immutable derivation tree (AST) built from grammar productions.
    Grammar
    Immutable grammar model with start symbol, productions, and metadata.

  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model
    Class
    Description
    DerivationTree
    Immutable derivation tree (AST) built from grammar productions.
    GrammarSymbol
    Common marker for non-terminals and terminals used inside grammar productions.
    NonTerminal
    One non-terminal symbol in a grammar.
    OperatorTerminal
    Terminal that references one executable operator definition.
    ProductionRule
    One grammar production rule.
    Terminal
    Base terminal symbol class.
    TypeSignature
    Optional type annotation for terminals and production rules.
    ValueType
    Runtime value type tags used by grammar symbols and production rules.
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.model used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.ops
    Class
    Description
    TypeSignature
    Optional type annotation for terminals and production rules.
